allow: Bash(git commit -m 'chore: initial repo setup with .gitignore and CLAUDE.md *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(plugin\): smart-blocks with 9 portfolio Gutenberg blocks *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(content\): WP-CLI provisioner for theme/plugin activation + homepage *)
Bash(git commit -m 'refactor\(plugin\): rebuild smart-blocks as native React Gutenberg blocks *)
Bash(git commit -m 'refactor\(plugin+theme\): light enterprise palette + content + new blocks + carousel + AJAX form *)
Bash(git commit -m 'refactor: convert all blocks to static-save \(pure React/JSX\), add cert badge upload, light editor *)
